---
description: "Start a 10-iteration autoresearch improvement loop on the English learning app"
agent: "orchestrator"
---

Read `autoresearch/results.tsv` and `autoresearch/backlog.md` to understand current state, then begin the 10-iteration autoresearch improvement loop. Follow your instructions precisely — propose, implement, test, evaluate, keep/discard — for each iteration. Record timing at every checkpoint. Generate a summary report after all 10 iterations complete.
